arts.ttl: Wrexham v Birmingham to have mind-blowing live screening at virtual stadium
arts.sum: Wrexham's home game against Birmingham in January will be viewed at shared reality events across the Atlantic.

arts.ttl: Wrexham owner Ryan Reynolds builds sporting empire amid links to new Welsh team
arts.sum: Ryan Reynolds has expanded his empire by investing in other teams after achieving success with Wrexham

arts.ttl: Premier League winner reveals he's mistaken for Wrexham owner Ryan Reynolds EVERY day
arts.sum: Ryan Reynolds is now one of the most recognisable faces in English football after purchasing Wrexham alongside co-investor Rob McElhenney in 2020 and they've recently enjoyed back-to-back promotions
